title: AV Apparel Contributor Seeds
description: Templates for catalog maintenance, pricing, copy, collections, QA, and merch UX.

harvestOutputsStandard.label: Rooting intent
harvestOutputsStandard.description: What matters, constraints, and definition of done.

harvestOutputsStandard.label: Change set
harvestOutputsStandard.description: Exactly what fields/files to edit and what to verify.

harvestOutputsStandard.label: QA script
harvestOutputsStandard.description: How to test the storefront like a customer.

harvestOutputsStandard.label: Proof payload
harvestOutputsStandard.description: What to attach to Mark Published: URLs, screenshots, diffs, notes.

templates.coreGoal: Identify and fix the top 10 trust-killers across listings.
templates.defaultConstraints: No pricing changes unless explicitly approved.

templates.coreGoal: Detect pricing inconsistencies and flag underwater items.
templates.defaultConstraints: Report + propose changes; do not publish price changes without approval.

templates.coreGoal: Add a new product end-to-end without breaking collections or variants.
templates.defaultConstraints: Add only one product/variant family. Do not touch existing pricing ladders.

templates.coreGoal: Remove/retire products and ensure no broken collections, links, or featured sections.
templates.defaultConstraints: Remove only items marked retired/out-of-stock. Verify no orphaned collection tiles.

templates.coreGoal: Normalize sizes/colors/images so cart behavior matches expectations.
templates.defaultConstraints: No new variants. Only fix mismatches and missing assets.

templates.coreGoal: Rebuild collections so the store feels curated (Core / Drops / Seasonal).
templates.defaultConstraints: Do not change product prices. Only rearrange and tag/collect.

templates.coreGoal: Rewrite product descriptions to match AV voice and improve conversion.
templates.defaultConstraints: Do not change pricing or variants. Keep descriptions short and consistent.

templates.coreGoal: Enforce naming format + tagging taxonomy across a selected set of products.
templates.defaultConstraints: Only touch titles/tags. No pricing. Verify search + filters still make sense.

templates.coreGoal: Ensure thumbnails and galleries match the correct design/color/variant.
templates.defaultConstraints: No copy/pricing changes. Only image fixes and missing asset repair.

templates.coreGoal: Prepare a drop page: products, ordering, pricing ladder, and QA gates.
templates.defaultConstraints: Limit to one drop. Ensure featured placement + rollback notes.

templates.coreGoal: Improve browse flow: featured, filters, sorting, empty-states, and trust signals.
templates.defaultConstraints: No catalog edits unless paired with a maintainer. Keep changes small and reversible.

templates.coreGoal: Generate a weekly snapshot: changes, issues found, fixes made, risks.
templates.defaultConstraints: Report only unless explicitly asked to publish fixes.
